message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

participant "main" as main #LightBlue2
participant "bkup.BackupFacade\n(Backup Facade)" as bkufacade #LavenderBlush1
participant "srcrepo.SourceRepository\n(Source Repository)" as srcrepo #PaleGreen3
participant "dstrepo.DestinationRepository\n(Dest Repo)" as dstrepo #PeachPuff4
participant "metarepo.MetadataRepository\n(Metadata Repos.)" as metarepos #Plum2
participant "scanner.AllFileScanner\n(File Scanner)" as scanner #Skyblue1
database FileSystem #Azure5 { }
database SQLite3 #Cornsilk6 { }


== Get all files ==
activate bkufacade 
    activate scanner
    
        note over filesystem : Scan file system
        
            scanner ->> FileSystem: get_all_files()
            
                return
            
        
        deactivate scanner 
        
    
return  -->> bkufacade   :all_files 

deactivate bkufacade 


== Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files ==
note right of srcfiles : Remove uncontained keys from Metadata repository
activate bkufacade 
    
    loop until generator finishes [until the generator finishes]
       
       alt if key not in source repo then remove it from meta data repos.  
           delete --> sqlite3   
           
               yield removed_metadata <color:red><<Return value discarded></color>:dashedline-> bkufacade     
               
       end
      
     end
     
     
    
    
    

end



@enduml
